message:
Update existing test suites for speculative pipeline field additions

Existing test file changes to accommodate new speculative CLI fields
and expanded robot event schema:

tests/cli_integration.rs:
- Add speculative pipeline fields (speculative, fast_model,
  quality_model, speculative_window_ms, speculative_overlap_ms,
  correction_tolerance_wer, no_adaptive, always_correct) to all
  TranscribeArgs struct literals in tests that construct args
  directly, maintaining compilation after the CLI struct expansion

tests/robot_contract_tests.rs:
- Import new required-field constants: SPECULATION_STATS_REQUIRED_FIELDS,
  TRANSCRIPT_CONFIRM_REQUIRED_FIELDS, TRANSCRIPT_CORRECT_REQUIRED_FIELDS,
  TRANSCRIPT_RETRACT_REQUIRED_FIELDS
- Update event_type_strings_are_correct_in_examples to include
  transcript.confirm, transcript.retract, transcript.correct,
  transcript.speculation_stats
- Rename schema_has_exactly_seven_event_types to
  schema_has_expected_event_types and update count from 7 to 11
- Add new event types to golden_robot_events known set
- Add new event types to robot_schema_documents_all_event_types
- Add new required-field lists to required_field_lists_are_non_empty,
  no_duplicate_fields_in_required_field_lists, and
  all_required_field_lists_include_event_and_schema_version tests

tests/speculation_core_tests.rs:
- Add wm_next_window_bounded_clamps_end_to_audio_limit test verifying
  bounded window end is clamped when natural end exceeds audio limit
- Add wm_next_window_bounded_exhausted_range_returns_none test
  verifying None is returned when start >= max_end

tests/speculation_type_tests.rs:
- Add confirmations_emitted field to SpeculationStats construction
  in robot_speculation_stats_has_required_fields test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
